campaign.title: Tendências 2026: Por que o veludo é o novo luxo

briefing.interpretation: The strategy highlights the 2026 trend of 'chenille' or velvet-style yarns in amigurumi as a high-end luxury material. By placing the artisanal toy in sophisticated, texture-rich environments, we position it as a premium collectible to drive blog traffic.
briefing.identifiedProduct: Handmade crochet Charmander amigurumi with visible knit yarn texture and soft fiber flame.
briefing.visualDirection: The 'realista' aesthetic focuses on high-fidelity textures of velvet fabrics, professional studio lighting, and tangible depth of field while preserving the toy's handcrafted yarn integrity.

channelRecommendations.recommendation: Main header image showcasing the amigurumi in a high-fashion interior setting.
channelRecommendations.prompt: Professional horizontal header photography of the exact **SUBJECT & STYLE: A handmade crochet toy amigurumi of the Pokémon Charmander. It must look like a physical, handcrafted yarn object, not a CGI model or a realistic animal. EXACT SHAPE: The figure features an oversized, slightly elongated head with a subtle snout. The body is plump and pear-shaped. Limbs are stubby: conical arms point outwards and downwards, while thick, rounded legs end in flat-bottomed feet. A long, tapering tail curves upwards from the base of the spine. MATERIAL TEXTURE: The entire surface exhibits a visible knit yarn texture consisting of tight, uniform single-crochet stitches in rounds. The belly and tail-underside patches are separate crocheted pieces stitched on. The flame at the tip of the tail has a soft, frayed, or brushed-out fiber texture. KEY FEATURES: Eyes: Large, vertical-oval eyes made from layered embroidery or felt, featuring black, Azure Blue, and white highlights. Face: Two tiny black horizontal lines for nostrils and a wide, thin black line for a simple, closed mouth. Tail Flame: A tuft of unspun or brushed yarn fibers creating a wispy flame effect. Claws: Three small, rounded Pure White nubs on each foot. COLORS: Primary Body: Vivid Clementine Orange. Belly & Tail Underside: Pale Buttermilk Yellow. Tail Flame: A gradient blend of Fire Red, Tangerine Orange, and Lemon Yellow. Eye Details: Black, Azure Blue, and Pure White. COMPOSITION: Full body view from multiple angles (front, side, and back) against a stark white background to highlight the silhouette and craftsmanship.**, placed on a luxurious emerald velvet armchair, soft natural light from a window, realistic high-end room background, 8k resolution.

channelRecommendations.recommendation: A series of close-ups focusing on the tactile contrast between the yarn and luxury velvet.
channelRecommendations.prompt: Macro toy photography of the exact **[FINGERPRINT]**, being touched by gentle hands with manicured nails, resting on a plush velvet texture, 'Tendências 2026' luxury aesthetic, soft studio lighting, pastel bokeh background, extremely detailed yarn stitches.

channelRecommendations.recommendation: Vertical center-framed shot for a 'reveal' or 'unboxing' feel.
channelRecommendations.prompt: Dynamic vertical shot of the exact **[FINGERPRINT]** inside a premium gift box lined with black velvet, soft warm lighting, shallow depth of field, high-end artisanal product presentation, vibrant colors.

channelRecommendations.recommendation: Clean, engaging shot emphasizing the 'gift' or 'luxury purchase' aspect.
channelRecommendations.prompt: Square product shot of the exact **[FINGERPRINT]** next to an elegant blank white price tag tied with a velvet ribbon, set on a clean marble surface, professional studio setup, soft shadows, luxury retail vibe.

channelRecommendations.recommendation: Professional workshop setting highlighting the business of amigurumi trends.
channelRecommendations.prompt: Wide professional shot of the exact **[FINGERPRINT]** on a designer's desk surrounded by velvet fabric swatches and color palettes, highlighting 2026 design trends, soft natural lighting, realistic professional atmosphere.
